      <a href="https://github.com/tonywied17/zero-query"><img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tonywied17/zero-query/main/.github/images/logo-animated.svg" width="120" alt="zQuery" /></a>
    </td>
    <td valign="middle">
      <h4><a href="https://github.com/tonywied17/zero-query">zQuery</a></h4>
      <p>Zero-dep reactive frontend library - components, SPA router, store, SSR, WebRTC. ~130&nbsp;KB minified.</p>
      <p>
        <a href="https://z-query.com"><picture><source media="(prefers-color-scheme: dark)" srcset="https://img.shields.io/badge/z--query.com-0d1117?style=flat-square&labelColor=21262d&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml%3Bbase64%"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/z--query.com-ffffff?style=flat-square&labelColor=d0d7de&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml%3Bbase64%" alt="website" /></picture></a>&nbsp;     <td width="160" align="center" valign="middle">
      <a href="https://github.com/tonywied17/zero-server"><img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tonywied17/zero-server/main/website-docs/public/icons/logo-animated.svg" width="120" alt="zero-server" /></a>
    </td>
    <td valign="middle">
      <h4><a href="https://github.com/tonywied17/zero-server">zero-server</a></h4>
      <p>Zero-dep Node backend - routing, ORM, auth, WebSocket, SSE, WebRTC, gRPC, observability.</p>
      <p>
        <a href="https://z-server.dev"><picture><source media="(prefers-color-scheme: dark)" srcset="https://img.shields.io/badge/z--server.dev-0d1117?style=flat-square&labelColor=21262d&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml%3Bbase64%"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/z--server.dev-ffffff?style=flat-square&labelColor=d0d7de&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml%3Bbase64%" alt="website" /></picture></a>&nbsp;     <td width="160" align="center" valign="middle">
      <a href="https://github.com/tonywied17/zero-transfer"><img src="https://tonywied17.github.io/zero-transfer/assets/zero-transfer-logo.svg" width="120" alt="zero-transfer" /></a>
    </td>
    <td valign="middle">
      <h4><a href="https://github.com/tonywied17/zero-transfer">zero-transfer</a></h4>
      <p>TypeScript file-transfer SDK - SFTP, FTPS, S3, Azure, GCS, Drive, Dropbox, WebDAV, and more.</p>
      <p>
        <a href="https://tonywied17.github.io/zero-transfer/"><picture><source media="(prefers-color-scheme: dark)" srcset="https://img.shields.io/badge/zero--transfer-0d1117?style=flat-square&labelColor=21262d&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml%3Bbase64%"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/zero--transfer-ffffff?style=flat-square&labelColor=d0d7de&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml%3Bbase64%" alt="website" /></picture></a>&nbsp;   <tr>
    <td width="160" align="center" valign="middle">
      <a href="https://github.com/tonywied17/molex-media-electron"><img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tonywied17/molex-media-electron/main/.github/assets/logo.svg" width="120" alt="molex-media" /></a>
    </td>
    <td valign="middle">
      <h4><a href="https://github.com/tonywied17/molex-media-electron">molex-media</a></h4>
      <p>Cross-platform media toolkit powered by FFmpeg - batch normalize / convert / compress, NLE timeline editor, and a media player with real-time visualizations.</p>
      <p>
        <a href="https://media.molex.cloud"><picture><source media="(prefers-color-scheme: dark)" srcset="https://img.shields.io/badge/media.molex.cloud-0d1117?style=flat-square&labelColor=21262d&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml%3Bbase64%"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/media.molex.cloud-ffffff?style=flat-square&labelColor=d0d7de&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml%3Bbase64%" alt="website" /></picture></a>&nbsp;     <td valign="middle">
      <h4><a href="https://github.com/tonywied17/bladewake-demo">Bladewake (Testing/Demo)</a></h4>
      <p>Fast-paced, neon-soaked sword arena combat - Godot 4.6 game with Nakama-backed online play. Early access test builds.</p>

  <tr>
    <td width="120" align="right" valign="middle"><b>Backend</b></td>

  <tr>

  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td width="120" align="right" valign="middle"><b>Auth &amp; Sec</b></td>
    <td valign="middle"><picture><source media="(prefers-color-scheme: dark)" srcset="https://img.shields.io/badge/JWT-0d1117?style=flat&labelColor=21262d&logo=jsonwebtokens&logoColor=white"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/JWT-ffffff?style=flat&labelColor=d0d7de&logo=jsonwebtokens&logoColor=1f2328" alt="JWT" /></picture>&nbsp; <picture><source media="(prefers-color-scheme: dark)" srcset="https://img.shields.io/badge/WebAuthn-0d1117?style=flat&labelColor=21262d&logo=yubico&logoColor=white"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/WebAuthn-ffffff?style=flat&labelColor=d0d7de&logo=yubico&logoColor=1f2328" alt="WebAuthn" /></picture>&nbsp;   </tr>
  <tr>
    <td width="120" align="right" valign="middle"><b>Infra</b></td>
    <td valign="middle"><picture><source media="(prefers-color-scheme: dark)" srcset="https://img.shields.io/badge/Docker-0d1117?style=flat&labelColor=21262d&logo=docker&logoColor=white"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Docker-ffffff?style=flat&labelColor=d0d7de&logo=docker&logoColor=1f2328" alt="Docker" /></picture>&nbsp; <picture><source media="(prefers-color-scheme: dark)" srcset="https://img.shields.io/badge/Nginx-0d1117?style=flat&labelColor=21262d&logo=nginx&logoColor=white"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Nginx-ffffff?style=flat&labelColor=d0d7de&logo=nginx&logoColor=1f2328" alt="Nginx" /></picture>&nbsp; <picture><source media="(prefers-color-scheme: dark)" srcset="https://img.shields.io/badge/Prometheus-0d1117?style=flat&labelColor=21262d&logo=prometheus&logoColor=white"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Prometheus-ffffff?style=flat&labelColor=d0d7de&logo=prometheus&logoColor=1f2328" alt="Prometheus" /></picture>&nbsp; <picture><source media="(prefers-color-scheme: dark)" srcset="https://img.shields.io/badge/Linux-0d1117?style=flat&labelColor=21262d&logo=linux&logoColor=white"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Linux-ffffff?style=flat&labelColor=d0d7de&logo=linux&logoColor=1f2328" alt="Linux" /></picture>&nbsp; <picture><source media="(prefers-color-scheme: dark)" srcset="https://img.shields.io/badge/Git-0d1117?style=flat&labelColor=21262d&logo=git&logoColor=white"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Git-ffffff?style=flat&labelColor=d0d7de&logo=git&logoColor=1f2328" alt="Git" /></picture>&nbsp; <picture><source media="(prefers-color-scheme: dark)" srcset="https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub%20Actions-0d1117?style=flat&labelColor=21262d&logo=githubactions&logoColor=white"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub%20Actions-ffffff?style=flat&labelColor=d0d7de&logo=githubactions&logoColor=1f2328" alt="GitHub Actions" /></picture></td>
  </tr>
</table>
